Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Continued To Nov-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorneys, Felicia Goldstein and Alberto Corres of the law offices of Villegas Carrera LLP (415-989-8000) appear as counsels for plaintiffs/opposing parties, Nelsa Guerra and Ana Campos

Attorney, Brenda F. Biren of the law offices of Sayad & Biren (415-392-4100) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Stanyan Park Hotel LLC

Attorney, Julia Levy of the law offices of Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck LLP (415-926-7600) appears as counsel for defendant, Raymond Jones

Judge Pro Tem McDonald addresses all sides regarding his disclosure that the law firm that he is associated with (Cresswell Echeguren) represented the Kaufman Dolowich law firm (counsel to a party in this case, but not to the present motion) in litigation (SFSC No. CGC08477993) that was resolved in 2010. JPT McDonald was not involved in that litigation in any way.

Plaintiffs do not stipulate to judge pro tem.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides.

DEFENDANT STANYAN PARK HOTEL LLC'S Motion To Compel Documents In Plaintiffs Workers Compensation File For In Camera Review is CONTINUED to November 17, 2017 at 9:30 AM in Department 302, Law and Motion. Plaintiff shall post court reporter fee. Further notice is waived.
